heading: Skills ({{count}})
newSkillTooltip: Create a new skill in this project using nakiros-skill-factory
noSkills: No skills found. Skills should be in
auditResumeTooltip: An audit is already running for this skill — click to resume
auditTooltip: Run an audit of this skill (uses nakiros-skill-factory)
fixResumeTooltip: A fix session is already running for this skill — click to resume
fixTooltip: Apply fixes based on the latest audit + eval results + feedback
fixNoAuditTooltip: Run an audit first — fix relies on its report
baselineTooltip: Also run each eval without the skill loaded, to measure real skill value via delta

modal.title: Create a new skill
modal.hint: Pick a short, kebab-case name. The skill-factory will ask design questions before writing any file.
modal.nameValidationError: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens. Must start with a letter.

evals.noEvals: No evals defined for this skill
evals.noBaselineTooltip: No baseline (without_skill) — absolute pass rate alone is weak evidence
